title: webdriverio@4.2.8 breaks build ⚠️
body:
Hello lovely humans, [webdriverio](https://www.npmjs.com/package/webdriverio) just published its new version 4.2.8.
State Failing tests :warning:
Dependency webdriverio
New version 4.2.8
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build kept failing**. **It looks like your project, in its current form, is malfunctioning** and this update didn’t really change that. I don’t want to leave you in the dark about updates though. I recommend you get your project passing and then check the impact of this update again. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 107 commits . - [`4147f8b`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/4147f8b01fec98e35d057b67ee88428c04e7e4d0) changelog update - [`7d49f21`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/7d49f212aa133a957d60ac355bac7c4d8ca7180a) v4.2.8 - [`f4c01a1`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/f4c01a1d8ec94ab20d62806e4e1f204ceed92de1) Update contributors - [`36f4381`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/36f4381420701af6e4365af2b830fd00924d91a3) allow to specify selector strategies directly - [`4e4a93c`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/4e4a93c241a2c5fc38fd2e229ba3fa1c433554e4) Merge pull request #1555 from wvankuipers/patch-1 - [`cfebba4`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/cfebba4587353fae87b212a2d49cd660c4a660b3) Missing --spec option - [`1f1e5c4`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/1f1e5c4b75251af78220bbe55ef101fc361512ff) v4.2.7 - [`5f2e309`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/5f2e3090bbff5b12e5df998770b6660d50db6f28) Update contributors - [`e84cc9d`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/e84cc9dd11ebb0e734cba863213276b70e813c7c) also remove lib directory - [`891f123`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/891f1230f5714d5ed8cede24be6ea3cdf1398a82) Merge pull request #1545 from paazmaya/1544-ignore-instead-files - [`b2470a1`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/b2470a1e1d55d1d05ffec8c80cdf78e6f5d4c97a) No more :pig: files but :princess: ignore - [`c4b3735`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/c4b37354819f01f39dbd8ce447e450c1c8a5f4f9) v4.2.6 - [`d027d1d`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/d027d1d921d3ff30dffed943928875da7076e8fb) Update contributors - [`54eed2c`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/54eed2ce6fdb62208d78c28003b793ff09c9de61) updated changelog - [`c6c46de`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/c6c46de5ce5bc08922db78e7c8dcdc3799aa3674) Merge pull request #1542 from paazmaya/1541-limit-files-npm-package There are 107 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/compare/9c24915faaff9e0b9ce75bbfcbcbee9bf0d8f349...4147f8b01fec98e35d057b67ee88428c04e7e4d0). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
